unit.name: blocks, block parser, block rendering, supports, bindings, hooks, style engine, HTML API, fonts, assets, and interactivity surface
unit.area: wp-includes/blocks.php wp-includes/blocks/ wp-includes/class-wp-block*.php wp-includes/block-*.php wp-includes/interactivity-api/ wp-includes/style-engine/ wp-includes/html-api/
unit.public_contract: This slice inventories WordPress block/interactivity runtime boundaries and fixture targets. It does not claim migrated runtime behavior, editor/browser ownership, or public PHP ABI replacement.

bridge.removal_gate: Promote bounded block/interactivity decisions to typed Haxe adapter contracts, then later to typed Adapter IR/original-path PHP with parser/render/support/bindings/style/interactivity, installed distribution, upstream PHPUnit, and browser/Gutenberg handoff evidence.
